actNotes.notes:
Enemy at the Gate:  Level 1 Gems
Breaking Some Eggs: Level 4 Gems
Mercy mission:      Quicksilver, Level 4 Gems
Caged Brute:        Level 8 Gems
Siren's Cadence:    Level 12 Gems
Trials: The Lower Prison

Iron Ring + Blue Gem = Sapphire Ring
Boots + Aug + Quicksilver = MS boots
Lvl 12 for 15% MS

Lvl 4 Hailrake, 8-10 Brutus, 12-13 Merveil

Great White Beast:  Quicksilver
Intruders in Black: Level 16 Gems (Heralds/Skitterbots)
Sharp and Cruel:    Level 18 Gems (Supports)
Bandits:            Alira 15% Res, Kraityn 8% Movespeed
Trials: Crypt, Chamber of Sins 2
CRAFT BENCH resistances + phys dmg

Boots + Aug + Quicksilver = MS boots
Lvl 24 for 20% Movespeed
iLvl 25 for 4-socket

Lvl 14-15 Fidelitas, 16 Weaver, 20-22 Vaal Oversoul

Lost in Love:         Lvl 24 Gems (Curses, Warcries, Anger)
Sever the Right Hand: Lvl 28 Gems
Fixture of Fate:      Siosa (Vendor w All Gems)
Trials: Crematorium, Catacombs, Imperial Gardens

Boots + Aug + Quicksilver = MS boots
Lvl 24 for 20% Movespeed 
Lvl 32 for 25% Movespeed 
iLvl 25 for 4-socket (vendors sell at player level 24)

Lvl 24 Enter Docks, 27 Piety, 28 Dominus

Breaking The Seal:  Lvl 34 Gems
Eternal Nightmare:  Lvl 38 Gems

Boots + Aug + Quicksilver = MS boots
Lvl 32 for 25% Movespeed

Lvl 30-31 Dried Lake, 31 Normal Lab, 34-35 Malachai

Check vendors every 3-4 levels
Gambling with gold for gear gives a LOT of 4-links
Gamble gear with stats matching colours you need
    Armour for red, Evasion for green, ES for blue

Boots + Aug + Quicksilver = MS boots
Lvl 32 for 25% Movespeed
Lvl 44 for 30% Movespeed
iLvl 35 for 5-links (rare!)

Lvl 40-42 Leave Chambers

Trials: The Prison

Check vendors every 3-4 levels
Gambling with gold for gear gives a LOT of 4-links
Gamble gear with stats matching colours you need
    Armour for red, Evasion for green, ES for blue

Boots + Aug + Quicksilver = MS boots

Stay at lowest level without penalty
5 levels under zone at player level 32-48

Trials: The Crypt, The Chamber of Sins

Check vendors every 3-4 levels
Gambling with gold for gear gives a LOT of 4-links
Gamble gear with stats matching colours you need
    Armour for red, Evasion for green, ES for blue

Boots + Aug + Quicksilver = MS boots

Stay at lowest level without penalty
5 levels under zone at player level 32-48
6 levels under zone at player level 48-62

Trials: Bath House

Check vendors every 3-4 levels
Gambling with gold for gear gives a LOT of 4-links
Gamble gear with stats matching colours you need
    Armour for red, Evasion for green, ES for blue

Boots + Aug + Quicksilver = MS boots

Lvl 54 Finish Act 8 (Harbour Bridge is last zone)

Trials: The Tunnel

Check vendors every 3-4 levels
Gambling with gold for gear gives a LOT of 4-links
Gamble gear with stats matching colours you need
    Armour for red, Evasion for green, ES for blue

Boots + Aug + Quicksilver = MS boots

Lvl 54 Enter BA
Leave at: 58 if strong, 60 if average, 62 if weak

Trials: The Ossuary

Check vendors every 3-4 levels
Gambling with gold for gear gives a LOT of 4-links
Gamble gear with stats matching colours you need
    Armour for red, Evasion for green, ES for blue

Boots + Aug + Quicksilver = MS boots

Stay at lowest level without penalty (6-7 under zone)

zoneNotes.notes:
Make the notes as wide as this line------------------------
Follow the coast up and right
ONLY kill Hillock

Stick to the right side following the wall
Don't kill anything
Grab the Waypoint then Exit > Mud Flats

The side without a ramp/cliff is the shortest
Kill Hailrake to get Medicine Chest
TP/Logout and turn in quest to Nessa
In town Waypoint > The Submerged Passage

Get level 4 here
Grab the three glyphs then Exit > Submerged Passage

This quest is optional and should be skipped to save time
Go in a circle and kill everything

First time here grab Waypoint then use Waypoint > The Coast
In town Exit > Tidal Island

Second time here find the bridge and place a portal
Then continue across the bridge to Exit > The Ledge

Third time here go right of staircase to
Exit > The Flooded Depths

There should be two rivers to cross with movement skill
Kill Deep Dweller - looks like essence mob
TP/Logout and turn in quest to Tarkleigh
In town Waypoint > The Ledge

First time here get the Waypoint, then Waypoint > Town
In town take portal to The Submerged Passage

Second time here little totems at the Waypoint point to the
Exit > The Climb

Always be going up, skip Faun to save time
Exit > The Lower Prison

Take the Waypoint
Do the Trial - Spike Traps
Try right first for the Exit > The Upper Prison

Try left first. Find hidden strongbox for quicksilvers
Kill Brutus then TP/Logout
In town Waypoint > Prisoner's Gate

Find the ramp/cliff down, Exit is after this ramp
Exit > The Ship Graveyard

Following the wall usually works
Look for The Ship Graveyard Cave and leave a portal
Find the Waypoint then Exit > The Cavern Of Wrath

Second time here, Exit > The Ship Graveyard Cave
In town Waypoint > Cavern Of Wrath

Get the Allflame from corpse, don't need to kill the rare
Exit > The Ship Graveyard to kill Fairgraves then logout

First time here take Waypoint > Town
In town take portal > Ship Graveyard

Second time here Exit > Cavern of Anger

Entering this zone completes Lvl 12 Gem Quest, can turn in
Often bottom right. You can follow the spirits.
If you see piles of gold you're close to Merveil
RECOMMEND high cold resist

Follow the right wall, exit > Town
In Town top right exit > The Old Fields

Follow the road, leave a portal at The Den
Then exit > The Crossroads

Kill Great White Beast and Logout
In Town Waypoint > The Crossroads

Follow the road to the waypoint, then Waypoint > Town
In Town take portal > The Den

Second time here go up/left to exit > Chamber of Sins

Third time here go down/right to exit > Fellshrine Ruins

Fourth time here go up/right to exit > The Broken Bridge

Follow the road to the right to kill Kraityn, TP/Logout
In Town Waypoint > The Riverways to do Einhar's Quest
Follow the road to exit > The Crypt
Do the Trial then Exit > The Crypt Level 2

Shake the Golden Hand then logout, don't need to kill rare
In Town Waypoint > The Crossroads

Circle to the center of the zone
The hallway next to the Waypoint leads to the next zone
Exit > The Chamber Of Sins Level 2

Do the Trial in top left
Kill Fidelitas in bottom right then logout
In Town Waypoint > The Crossroads

If Einhar quest has Farric Ursa kill it and 3 other beasts
(chance to craft tabula)
Follow the road, get Waypoint then exit > Western Forest

Second time here Exit > Wetlands
Always on the opposite side of the road from Waypoint

Get Waypoint, go to the end of the path, kill boss and get
Thaumatic Emblem, use it and TP/logout
In Town Waypoint > Act 1 Bestel quest turn in
Then Waypoint > Western Forest

Second time here Exit > Weaver's Chambers
Always on opposite side as the broken section of road.

Third time here help Alira
Always on same side as the broken section of road, logout
In Town Waypoint > The Wetlands

Go left if you can, otherwise loop around right side
Kill Weaver then TP/Logout, Waypoint > The Riverways

Kill Oak in top left
Then go around top left side of camp for Waypoint
Waypoint > The Western Forest for Alira

Second time here Exit > The Vaal Ruins
Exit > The Northern Forest

Go to the top right by following the shoreline
Do not go in the Dread Thicket
Exit > The Caverns
This zone should be skipped to save time

[OPTIONAL] Good time to go to town for more lightning res
Try going up from waypoint
Exit > The Ancient Pyramid
There's also a useless craft, skip it

Exits are usually diagonal from entrance
Kill Vaal Oversoul, Logout, then Waypoint > Act 3
CRAFT - Spell damage

Don't forget to talk to Clarissa
Exit > Town > The Slums
CRAFT - Movement Speed

Find the grates to the sewers
Then Exit > The Crematorium

Try left first, get Waypoint
Do the trial, get the craft, kill Piety,
pick up the bracelet then tp/logout
In Town talk to Clarissa then exit > The Sewers
CRAFT - Fire damage

First bust before Waypoint
Second is just after it
If second bust is in big room last bust is up, otherwise
    last bust is right
Exit is up and left, exit > The Marketplace

Use the Sulphite, Get the craft, Exit > The Ebony Barracks
CRAFT - Physical damage

Skip the quest item
Usually up and right, then go through the statue hall
Get the Waypoint then exit > The Catacombs

Second time here right hand wall follow to find the exit
Exit > The Battlefront

Do the trial, get the craft, then logout
In Town Waypoint > The Marketplace
CRAFT - Ele Damage w/ Attacks

Go up and left for the Waypoint
Spool is usually down/left from Waypoint
Then go left from Waypoint to Exit > The Docks

Second time here go up to Exit > The Solaris Temple

Get the waypoint, follow the carpets
Exit > Solaris Temple Level 2

Follow the carpets, turn in Ribbon Spool, logout
In Town Waypoint > The Sewers
CRAFT - Cold damage

Get a lot of XP here
Usually left side, get the Sulphite then logout
In Town Waypoint > The Battlefront

Go up/left, kill General Gravicus then exit is usually up
Don't forget the Waypoint!
Exit > The Lunaris Temple

Second time here go right to Exit > The Imperial Gardens

Don't kill Kole, follow the carpets, get the Waypoint
Exit > The Lunaris Temple Level 2

Always go up stairs if you find them, should be two sets
After stairs there will be carts on both sides,
    pick the side where there is only one
Kill Piety, get the craft and TP/Logout
In town turn in quests then Waypoint > The Ebony Barracks
CRAFT - Lightning damage

Follow the road until the end, get the waypoint
[OPTIONAL] The Library is up/left from Waypoint
To the Trial, usually up from Waypoint
Then go right from Waypoint to Exit > The Sceptre Of God
CRAFT - All attributes

Find Waypoint in the middle of the zone and talk to Siosa
Exit > The Archives to do his quest

Second time here turn in quest and buy gems
Logout then Waypoint > The Imperial Gardens

Get the 4 pages then logout and Waypoint > The Library
Bring currency when buying gems from Siosa

Exits spawn in a random corner, often diagonally across
Exit > The Upper Sceptre Of God

Get some cold and lightning resist before fighting Dominus
Exits spawn in a random corner, often diagonally across
Kill Dominus then exit > The Aqueduct

Follow the river, exit > Town
In Town > Dried Lake

Level to 31 here, Voll is either directly down, right, or
down/right from Waypoint
Kill Voll, get the craft, logout
In Town exit > The Mines
CRAFT - Attack/Cast speed
Exit is usually top left corner, Exit > Level 2
Find the spirit then exit > The Crystal Veins

Loop around bottom right to go to the top left exit
Get the waypoint and crafting, then tp/logout for quest turnin
In Town Waypoint > Act 3 for Labyrinth
After Lab Waypoint > Crystal Veins

Exit > Daresso's Dream

Exit > Kaom's Dream

Talk to Dialla, exit > The Belly Of The Beast
G,CRAFT - Resistance

Follow passages and bridges, zig-zag up and left
Exit > Kaom's Stronghold

Follow passages and bridges, zig-zag up and left
Kill Kaom, logout, in Town Waypoint > The Crystal Veins
RECOMMEND fire resist
Move towards the top right, Exit > The Grand Arena

Move down and left from Waypoint, then follow the path
Kill Daresso, logout, in Town Waypoint > The Crystal Veins
RECOMMEND cold resist

zoneNotes.zoneName: The Belly of the Beast Level 1
zoneNotes.notes: Aim for top left, exit > Level 2

zoneNotes.zoneName: The Belly of the Beast Level 2
zoneNotes.notes:
Get Level 34-35 before Malachai
Aim for top left, get the craft, kill Piety > The Harvest
CRAFT - Chaos damage

Get Level 34-35 before Malachai
Always one boss on right side, two on the left

Go up and right, cross the bridge and follow the road to
a small passage to the exit
CRAFT - Ailment, Stun and Curse Mitigation

Go all the way down, then left, kill Overseer Crow then
Exit > Town, in Town Exit > The Control Blocks

Go top left for the Miasmeter, then up and right to kill
Justicar Casticus, then Exit > Oriath Square

Go top right until you cross the bridge, then down
Exit > The Templar Courts
Loop around clockwise, Exit > The Chamber Of Innocence

Loop around clockwise, get Sign Of Purity then logout
In Town Waypoint > Ruined Square
CRAFT - Physical damage

Find 3 quest items in corners of the zone then logout
In Town Waypoint > Ruined Square
CRAFT - Accuracy

Run top left and kill Kitava!
When you get to Act 6 exit > Twilight Strand

Get Level 42 here
Go up and left, then spiral counter clockwise, kill Avarius
Exit > The Torched Courts
CRAFT - Movement speed

One layout, multiple stops
Zig-zag up and left to get Waypoint and Exit > The Ossuary

Second time here exit is at the bottom of the zone, leave a
portal by the fountain then exit > The Reliquary

Third time here from portal go up/left
Exit > Cathedral Rooftop
Loop around counter clockwise to exit > The Ruined Square

Clear to open Lilly's Gem shop then logout
In Town Exit > The Coast

Go to the right side of the zone and go to the top right
corner, grab the Waypoint then Exit > The Mud Flats
This zone should be skipped to save time

Kill the boss on the right side then go left
Exit > Karui Fortifications

Follow the right hand side, kill Tukohama
Exit > Karui Fortifications
CRAFT - Defences

Follow the path until you can go right, then follow that
until you have a path up left then Exit > The Lower Prison

Try down or left for exit, Trial will be nearby to Waypoint
Exit > Shavronne's Tower
TRIAL - Spike traps
CRAFT - Double resistance

Four mini-zones, the steps are:
1. Follow the halls, 2. go over thin bridge in center,
3. Go around and over thin bridge, 4. Go around to find
middle bridge area with staircase to boss.
Kill boss then Exit > Warden's Chamber > Prisoner's Gate
CRAFT - Spell damage

Find the ramp/cliff downwards then wall follow for Abberath
Follow the road to Exit > The Western Forest

Follow the road to Exit > Riverways
CRAFT - Attributes

Follow the road to the Waypoint, then go up for Rhyslatha
Exit > The Wetlands

Second time here keep following road, when you find
encampment go down and right to Exit > The Southern Forest

Get Waypoint, follow the right hand wall
Exit > Cavern of Anger

Don’t forget the black flag upon entering this zone
Go down then up first, then go right, then exit can be up
or down, Exit > The Beacon

Follow the shoreline until you reach the beacons
Don't forget the craft, then Sail > Brine King's Reef
CRAFT - Life/Mana

Follow the left hand shoreline to the Brine King's arena
RECOMMEND capped lightning resist
and capped cold resist

Find the locket for an extra Utility flask
Follow the road to the left to Exit > Town

Don’t forget the Waypoint!
Follow the road for the Waypoint, then go down and right
Exit > The Fellshrine Ruins

Second time here go up and right from Waypoint
Exit > The Chamber of Sins
Follow the road, go down right to the end then go up right

Do the trial, then open the sarcophagus for the second area
In second area find Maligaro's map then logout
In Town Waypoint > The Crossroads
TRIAL - Spinning blades
CRAFT - Damage over time

Loop around to the center, then activate the Waypoint
Use the map from the Crypt in the map device

Second time here after Maligaro, follow the hall by the
Waypoint to Exit > The Chamber of Sins Level 2
CRAFT - Lightning damage

There should be a fork near the entrance, go left for Trial
then later go right, and exit is in top right of zone, past
where you fought Fidelitas in Act 2
Click the cracked wall to show the exit
Exit > The Den

Follow the edges of the zone, cross all the bridges, before
the fight leave a portal in case you die
After killing Maligaro take the portal to go back to Silk
RECOMMEND lightning resist
Either top right or top left to Exit > The Ashen Fields

Follow the road to the left
RECOMMEND phys mitigation, bleed removal

Wall-follow the left side to Exit > The Dread Thicket

Then Wall-follow the right side to Exit > The Causeway

Explore the zone and find the fireflies, kill Gruthkul
CRAFT - Fire damage
RECOMMEND physical mitigation

Go top right to the exit. Loot Kishara's star near the exit
Exit > The Vaal City
CRAFT - Cold damage

Find and follow the thick walls to guide you to the exit
Exit > The Temple of Decay

Just like Act 2, exits are usually diagonal from entrances
CRAFT - Accuracy
RECOMMEND capped lightning resist

Same as Level 1
Just like Act 2, exits are usually diagonal from entrances
CRAFT - Accuracy
RECOMMEND capped lightning resist

Left hand wall-follow, go up stairs, follow the wall
Exit > Town > The Toxic Conduits
Follow black paint on the floor, Exit > Deodre's Cesspool

The path without a dead end leads all the way to the exit.
After beating Doedre go left to Exit > The Grand Promenade

Second time here go right to Exit > The Quay
CRAFT - Resistance
Wall-follow the right side to Exit > The Bath House

Follow the upper levels, eventually one will lead to a big
staircase that leads to boss, kill boss then logout
In Town Waypoint > The Bath House

Do the Trial either on top of the zone or the left
Then top or left of the zone to Exit > The High Gardens

Second time here go right from Waypoint to
Exit > The Lunaris Concourse

Go up and right for Waypoint then up and left to
Exit > Lunaris Temple

Second time here, after beating both temples, go down and
right to Exit > Harbour Bridge
Follow the carpets, get the Waypoint, Exit > Level 2

Always go up stairs if you find them, should be two sets
After stairs there will be vases on the opposite wall,
    pick the side where there is only one
Logout after boss then in Town Waypoint > Deodre's Cesspool
CRAFT - Minions
RECOMMEND capped cold resistance

Follow bottom edge of the map the whole zone
Go down from the entrance to get the quest item, then
go right to fight Tolman, then go up and right to
Exit > The Grain Gate

Only enter and leave buildings that have guard corpses
Kill the Gemlings then Exit > The Imperial Fields

Follow the road until the end, then keep going that way
Exit > The Solaris Temple

Skip this zone, faster to get to Harbour Bridge by
Logout, Waypoint > Lunaris Concourse > The Harbour Bridge

Go down and left, then up and left for the Waypoint, which
is always on the path. Then go up and left to
Exit > Level 2

Follow the carpets, kill the boss then logout
In Town Waypoint > The Lunaris Concourse
RECOMMEND capped fire resistance

Farm here before Boss if you are under leveled
Follow the path top and right to find the boss
RECOMMEND capped fire and cold resist

Go to the top left, cross the bridges on dead ends
This zone is great for EXP
Exit > Town

Go up and right to hoist,
then down and left to next hoist,
then up and right to Exit > The Vastiri Desert

Go right to find Waypoint, then go right to find The Oasis,
then TP to town for quest item, then come back here to
Exit > The Oasis

Second time here go up and left to Exit > The Foothills

If the dead end is above, right hand wall follow
If the dead end is below, left hand wall follow
Fight boss then logout

Don't forget the Waypoint!
Go up and left to find Waypoint, then right to
Exit > The Boiling Lake

Second time here go up and left to Exit > The Tunnel

Go top right, petrified men means you're close to boss
Kill boss, get quest item then logout
In Town Waypoint > The Foothills

Go up and left, near the entrance there is a fork to the
left or right, follow it for Trial
After Trial go up and left to Exit > The Quarry
TRIAL - Blade sentries
CRAFT - All attributes

Go up and left for Waypoint, then left for boss, logout
In Town Waypoint > The Quarry

Second time here go up and right to Exit > The Refinery

Third time here Exit > The Belly of The Beast
CRAFT - Physical damage
RECOMMEND physical mitigation

Follow the cart tracks top and right for Boss, then logout
In Town Waypoint > The Quarry
RECOMMEND lightning resist
Go top and left to Exit > The Rotting Core
Go top and left to find The Black Core and kill the trio

Go up and left to save Bannon, logout, come back
Then go down and right to Exit > The Ravaged Square

Leave a portal at entrance!
Follow right wall to Exit > The Control Blocks

Second time here follow left wall, skip the first opening
and take the second then cross the bridge
Keep following left wall to get the Waypoint, then
Waypoint > The Control Blocks

Second time here Exit > The Ossuary

Third time here go down and right to Exit > Torched Courts

Fourth time here Exit > The Canals
Follow left wall to Exit > The Desecrated Chambers
Follow right wall until the four pillars, then go up

Take the Waypoint > Town, in Town take portal

Second time here follow right wall, use movement skills to
jump through fences. Kill the boss then logout
In Town Waypoint > The Ravaged Square

This zone should be skipped to save time. It gives a
useless belt.

Follow left wall to find trial and quest item
Trial entrance is in the opening in the wall
Quest item is close to that opening, but away from the wall
TRIAL - Dart traps
CRAFT - Chaos damage

Move top left, follow the road, cross bridges bridges
Exit > The Feeding Trough

Move top left, kill Kitava!
CRAFT - Defenses
